layoutRegions.name: masthead
layoutRegions.purpose: Summarize emergency-access rehearsal health and expose the report sealing action.

layoutRegions.name: rehearsal-grid
layoutRegions.purpose: Compare active break-glass rehearsals, grant scope, windows, status, and completion progress.

layoutRegions.name: evidence-panels
layoutRegions.purpose: Track privileged grant simulations, responder timing, failed controls, vault evidence, cleanup steps, and rollback reports.

components.name: MetricCard
components.purpose: Compact rehearsal totals with token-colored risk emphasis.
interactions: maintains stable height across summary values
uses semantic token borders for risk tone

components.name: RehearsalCard
components.purpose: Detailed card for a break-glass rehearsal run with status, grant scope, window, and progress.
interactions: status chip remains readable on narrow screens

components.name: EvidenceRow
components.purpose: Dense row for simulated grants, timing lanes, vault evidence, and report inputs.
interactions: row layout stacks at mobile widths
status labels use semantic token colors

components.name: PrimaryAction
interactions: hover and focus-visible states use accent tokens

acceptanceChecks: Generated app imports src/omarchy-theme.css before app styles.
Every visible color comes from a --omarchy-* CSS variable or color-mix using one.
Every button, row, input, and command item has a visible :focus-visible state.
Layout remains stable at 320px, 768px, and 1280px viewport widths.
Primary content is usable on first load without a marketing interstitial.
A .desktop launcher can be generated with omarchy-native app desktop.
An opt-in theme sync hook can be generated with omarchy-native app hook.
